notes: LlamaIndex ReActAgent — Nemotron Nano 30B (DeepInfra fp4). FunctionTool.from_defaults introspects type annotations automatically. Eval details: {'portfolio_beginning_correct': False, 'portfolio_ending_correct': False, 'account_number_found': False, 'account_type_found': True, 'top_holding_found': False, 'is_structured_json': False}
raw_output:
<tool_call>
<function=reducto_extract>
<parameter=input_url>
https://cdn.reducto.ai/samples/fidelity-example.pdf
</parameter>
<parameter=schema_json>
{"type": "object", "properties": {"portfolio_value": {"type": "object", "description": "Beginning and ending portfolio values from the summary table", "properties": {"beginning": {"type": "number", "description": "Beginning portfolio value in dollars"}, "ending": {"type": "number", "description": "Ending portfolio value in dollars"}}}, "account_number": {"type": "string", "description": "The brokerage account number"}, "account_type": {"type": "string", "description": "Account type e.g. GENERAL INVESTMENTS"}, "income_summary": {"type": "object", "description": "Income breakdown by tax category (taxable, tax-exempt, etc.)"}, "top_holdings": {"type": "array", "description": "Top holdings by value", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}, "value": {"type": "number", "description": "Market value in dollars"}, "percentage": {"type": "number", "description": "Portfolio percentage 0-100"}}}}}"
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
